## Spec impact

- [ ] No spec change
- [ ] Spec changed: <!-- which files under specs/ -->
- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] Breaking — version bumped, ADR added

## Checklist

- [ ] `make spec-lint` passes
- [ ] `make test-ingest` passes
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 80% (run `pytest --cov=app`)
- [ ] No new warnings in lint output
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (README, docstrings, ADR)

# commands to reproduce / test
